name: xclaw
description: xClaw — Open-source AI Agent Platform with multi-agent orchestration, streaming, MCP, and visual workflow builder

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/integrations && npm run build -w packages/domains && npm run build -w packages/ml && npm run build -w packages/skills && npm run build -w packages/skill-hub && npm run build -w packages/gateway && npm run build -w packages/server && npm run build -w packages/web && npm run build -w docs
scripts.build:server: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/integrations && npm run build -w packages/domains && npm run build -w packages/ml && npm run build -w packages/skills && npm run build -w packages/gateway && npm run build -w packages/server
